texto: Here’s something to think about: the only thing you really own is what you create. And the only thing you can create without needing someone else to give you the raw materials first… is intellectual property.You can write a book, or draw a picture, or compose some music.Everything else is borrowed. It belonged to someone else before you and it will belong to someone else after you.
explicacao: Citação de Caliban Darklock sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Here’s something to think about: the only thing you really own is what you create. And the only t…” articula reflexao, creativity, entrepreneurship em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como entrepreneurship e intellectual-property.

texto: Once upon a time, in the not-so-distant past, very weird people were effectively isolated from all the other very weird people.But today, the internet makes it possible for very weird people from anywhere on the planet to get on the internet and talk to one another.
explicacao: Citação de Caliban Darklock sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Once upon a time, in the not-so-distant past, very weird people were effectively isolated from al…” articula tempo, connection, internet em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como internet e people.

texto: The more ethical and honest your business is, the harder it is to make money. And you have to understand this going in: when you start a business, being good and moral and ethical and, you know, legal… means you will make less money than someone who simply does not give a fuck.If you’re wondering where all this is going, the point to all this is to hammer into your skull the blunt reality that you and your new business are indistinguishable from the worst examples of the industry, and nobody cares.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Caliban Darklock sobre temas ligados a negocios. A afirmação “The more ethical and honest your business is, the harder it is to make money. And you have to und…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a negocios, business, entrepreneurship, útil em momentos de estudos e entrepreneurship.
